data.body: ESCALATION RESOLVED: all six remaining tickets now hold SIGNED plan-review PASS attestations (verify-signature --kind plan-review certifies on each): 8d8e producer-seam (new), ee0b trusted gate service (rewritten), 76d2 AWS IaC+deploy (new, zero-fixed-cost runtime), 8f1d HMAC contract (rewritten), 6a89 docs/ADR (updated), 4214 merge-gate remediation (findings #4+#5 era-anchor). Design settled across three escalation addenda: fork-A uniform producer signing, cost-verified compose-on-existing-VM + API GW SigV4 runtime, era-at-storage-anchor anti-rollback. All ~60 blocking findings across ~12 review rounds were legitimate (no gate false positives requiring criteria remediation; one stale-sidecar re-quote self-resolved on fingerprint change). Implementation order: land 649/650/660 stack -> 4214 new patchset (change 664) -> 8d8e -> ee0b -> 76d2 (deploy) -> 8f1d -> 6a89.
